welcomeSubtitle: See what the Union spent with your income tax — in rupees, with FY 2024-25 (new regime) numbers.
welcomeAboutBody: An educational “year in review” for your income tax — like a music Wrapped, but for how your estimated tax lines up with Union spending. We use FY 2024-25 new-regime slab math, then split your tax across CGA-style functional heads and major ministries (from our data files). Not tax advice. Calculations run in your browser; your salary is not sent to our servers.
earnQuestion: How much did you earn in FY 2024-25?
newRegimeOnly: New regime only for now — old regime coming soon.
trust: Only used to calculate your wrap. Nothing is stored on our servers.
salaryHint: CTC or in-hand ballpark. You can enter your exact tax from Form 16 instead.
exactTaxLabel: I will enter my exact tax from Form 16
actualsNote: Income tax only, FY 2024-25 / AY 2025-26 new regime. Spending split uses CGA functional actuals when provided; GST and other indirect taxes are separate.
